function.outcome_justification: Across five invoices dated 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2025-12-29, 2026-02-14, and 2026-03-26, the line item 'follow-up timeline prototype review' has line_eur values 240, 480, 240, 240, and 240 respectively; sum = 1440.
